problem: Find the projection of the vector $\begin{pmatrix} 4 \\ 5 \end{pmatrix}$ onto the vector $\begin{pmatrix} 2 \\ 0 \end{pmatrix}.$

classified_questions.question: Can you explain what is meant by the "projection" of one vector onto another?
classified_questions.label: r

classified_questions.question: How can we use the formula for projection to find the projected vector in this case?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.label: b
